AccountID.title: Account ID
AccountID.description: NetSuite account ID (e.g., '1234567' or '1234567_SB1' for sandbox).

ConsumerKey.title: Consumer Key
ConsumerKey.description: Integration record's Consumer Key (a.k.a. Client ID).

ConsumerSecret.title: Consumer Secret
ConsumerSecret.description: Integration record's Consumer Secret (a.k.a. Client Secret).

TokenID.title: Token ID
TokenID.description: Access Token ID for the integration user.

TokenSecret.title: Token Secret
TokenSecret.description: Access Token Secret for the integration user.
